## Checklist

- [ ] This PR targets `develop`, **not** `main`
- [ ] My branch is named `feature/<issue-number>-short-desc` or `fix/<issue-number>-short-desc`
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass locally in whichever of `client`/`server` I touched
- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, secrets, or credentials
- [ ] I updated relevant docs/README if behavior changed
